# Visual Specification — doug-march.com — 2026-04-29

---

## 1. Color Specification

### Primary Hue: 280° (cool blue-violet)

Rationale: The full moon demands clarity without warmth. Hue 280° places the entire neutral system in a cool violet register — almost imperceptible at 5–8% saturation, but enough to make near-blacks read as deep space rather than muddy charcoal. It mirrors moonlight through spring air. All six recent builds occupied 22°–210°; this moves sharply to the opposite hemispher

output.rationale: The full moon (96.5% illumination) and its demand for maximum clarity architect the entire token system. Hue 280° (cool violet) tints all neutrals at 5–8% saturation—imperceptible warmth, unifying the palette through a single hue family rather than temperature shifts.
